full_text:
Kuai Qi 蒯祺
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kuai Qi (蒯祺). Governor of Fangling. Killed by Meng Da’s troops. Kuai Qi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Kuai Qi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
